languages.text: "Хорошая новость: гемункул готов тебя освободить. Плохая: он требует от тебя извинений и признания его научного гения".
"I have good news: the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. First, however, he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."
languages.original_text: "Хорошая новость: гемункул готов тебя освободить. Плохая: он требует от тебя извинений и признания его научного гения".

traits.locale_text: "The good news is the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. The bad news is he demands an apology and submission to his genius."
"The good news is the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. The bad news is he demands an apology and submission to his genius."
"The good news is the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. The bad news is he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."
"The good news is the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. The bad news is he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."
"I have good news: the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. First, however, he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."
"I have good news: the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. First, however, he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."

languages.text: "Ich habe gute Neuigkeiten: Der Haemonculus ist bereit, Euch die Freiheit zu schenken. Allerdings verlangt er dafür zuerst eine Entschuldigung und die Anerkennung seines Genies."
languages.original_text: "I have good news: the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. First, however, he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe gute Neuigkeiten: Der Haemonculus ist bereit, Euch die Freiheit zu schenken. Allerdings verlangt er dafür zuerst eine Entschuldigung und die Anerkennung seines Genies."

languages.text: « J'ai une bonne nouvelle : l'hémoncule est disposé à vous libérer. Cependant, il exige avant cela que vous lui présentiez vos excuses et que vous reconnaissiez son génie. »
languages.original_text: "I have good news: the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. First, however, he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai une bonne nouvelle : l'hémoncule est disposé à vous libérer. Cependant, il exige avant cela que vous lui présentiez vos excuses et que vous reconnaissiez son génie. »

languages.text: «Buenas noticias: el Hemónculo está dispuesto a dejarle marchar. Sin embargo, primero exige una disculpa y el reconocimiento de su genialidad».
languages.original_text: "I have good news: the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. First, however, he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."

traits.locale_text: «Buenas noticias: el Hemónculo está dispuesto a dejarle marchar. Sin embargo, primero exige una disculpa y el reconocimiento de su genialidad».

languages.text: "İyi haberlerim var. Haimonkulus sana özgürlüğünü vermeye istekli. Ancak özür dilemeni ve dehasını kabul etmeni talep ediyor."
languages.original_text: "I have good news: the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. First, however, he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."

traits.locale_text: "İyi haberlerim var. Haimonkulus sana özgürlüğünü vermeye istekli. Ancak özür dilemeni ve dehasını kabul etmeni talep ediyor."

languages.text: “我有个好消息：血伶人愿意放你自由。但他要求你道歉，还要承认他是个天才。”
languages.original_text: "I have good news: the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. First, however, he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."

traits.locale_text: “我有个好消息：血伶人愿意放你自由。但他要求你道歉，还要承认他是个天才。”

languages.text: 「いい知らせがある――ハエモンクルスが君に自由を与えると言っている。ただし、まずは謝罪と、奴の天才性を認めることを要求している」
languages.original_text: "I have good news: the Haemonculus is willing to grant you freedom. First, however, he demands an apology and acknowledgement of his genius."

traits.locale_text: 「いい知らせがある――ハエモンクルスが君に自由を与えると言っている。ただし、まずは謝罪と、奴の天才性を認めることを要求している」
